control_overhead_comparison.semantics: control checks are bundled; role packets, approvals, hashes, stale markers, and final replay are not removed

ai_discretion_bypass.expected_failure: AI discretion was used to downgrade or skip a barrier
failures: AI discretion was used to downgrade or skip a barrier

cache_reuse_after_input_change.expected_failure: cache reuse claimed after input hash changed
failures: cache reuse claimed after input hash changed

failures: cache reuse claimed after source hash changed

cache_reuse_with_bad_evidence_hash.expected_failure: cache reuse claimed with invalid evidence hash
failures: cache reuse claimed with invalid evidence hash

completion_without_all_barriers.expected_failure: completion recorded before every barrier bundle passed
failures: completion recorded before every barrier bundle passed

completion_without_all_role_slices.expected_failure: completion recorded before all role slices were covered
failures: completion recorded before all role slices were covered

failures: Controller read a sealed packet/result body

failures: final closure passed before all legacy obligations were covered

failures: final closure passed without clean final ledger

failures: final closure passed without terminal backward replay

failures: packet ledger gate missing from bundled evidence

missing_pm_gate.expected_failure: PM gate missing from bundled evidence
failures: PM gate missing from bundled evidence

failures: process FlowGuard officer gate missing from bundled evidence

failures: product FlowGuard officer gate missing from bundled evidence

failures: barrier bundle missing a required legacy obligation

failures: barrier bundle missing a required role slice

missing_reviewer_gate.expected_failure: reviewer gate missing from bundled evidence
failures: reviewer gate missing from bundled evidence

route_mutation_without_frontier_rewrite.expected_failure: route mutation did not rewrite the frontier
failures: route mutation did not rewrite the frontier

route_mutation_without_stale_mark.expected_failure: route mutation did not mark affected evidence stale
failures: route mutation did not mark affected evidence stale

failures: run-until-wait applied a PM, reviewer, or officer decision

failures: run-until-wait crossed a role or user wait boundary

failures: run-until-wait skipped a packet ledger check

failures: stale evidence was used by a barrier
